title: Why the Villainess Wields the Sword
titleEnglish: Why the Villainess Wields the Sword
titleNative: 그 악녀가 검을 든 이유
synonyms: The Reason Why the Villainess Picked up a Sword
The Reason the Villainess Took Up the Sword
悪女が剣を持った理由
synopsis: No one knows how the pampered and wicked Erin Lisus suddenly becomes a top swordsman at Atenz Academy. That's because they don't realize that Erin was actually transported to the past after being killed by her stepmother and was reborn into different worlds. Now, with her past experience as a swordmaster, Erin's out to get revenge and rescue her allies from her stepmother's grasp. But with foes at every corner, can Erin save her loved ones? Or will her reason to wield the sword vanish with them? (Source: Tapas)

title: Stop! I'm Falling for You!
titleNative: やめろ好きになってしまう
synonyms: Stop it! I'll end up falling for you!!!
synopsis: Is it intentional or innocent?! A messy-minded rom-com that lives up to its name!! Matsura is a calm, composed high school boy who’s always lived his life putting up a front. He’s good at reading people and can easily see through their true nature, but for unknown reasons, he’s constantly approached by Kyuragi—a beautiful girl with pigtails who’s part of the popular group! Whether it’s intentional or not, her playful and cunning actions keep throwing him off, and before he knows it, Matsura is yelling, "Stop! I'm falling for you!" (Source: Manga Plus)

title: Nippon Sangoku
titleNative: 日本三國
synopsis: In the near future, after the collapse of civilization, a young man stands up to reunify Japan, which has once again become a war-torn country. His name is Aoteru Misumi. His tale, later regarded as that of a genius military tactician, begins now! (Source: Manga One, translated)

title: The Mask of Truth
titleNative: 真理面具
synopsis: By chance, Wu Mian obtained a mask that forces absolute obedience on other people. But even then, he couldn't muster up the courage to confess to the girl he had a crush on. Until an incident that turned his life completely upside down... (Source: QQ, translated)

title: Daemabeopsa Curriculum
titleNative: 대마법사 커리큘럼
synopsis: Eugene, a kind and righteous, yet somewhat intimidating wizard, takes in his master's daughter, Ain, as his apprentice and aims to raise her into a great wizard. In a world both saved by magic and thrown into chaos by magic, join Eugene and strive towards becoming a great wizard! (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Ura Dungeon Oku-san
titleNative: 裏ダンジョンおくさん
synonyms: The Strongest Wife in the Hidden Dungeon
synopsis: After the Demon King was slain, a "hidden dungeon" suddenly appeared in a frontier town, said to be overrun by unimaginable monsters and to hold unbelievable treasures!! The newlywed Yui, about to attempt the dungeon, carries a certain secret...!? The level-99 martial artist who saved the world changes jobs to a level-1 housewife, only to be dragged into tackling a brutal dungeon!

title: Mashou no Otome no Yakumawari
titleNative: 魔性の乙女の役廻り
synopsis: Kairan Girls’ Academy: a boarding school rich with history and tradition, attended only by orphans. It has a special system in which students are given “roles” that align with their individual goals. Hanako Shimura, a kind-hearted girl filled with dreams and expectations, enrolls into the academy hoping to make friends with everyone at school. But will she be able to? (source: Comic Gamma Plus, translated)

title: Masin
titleNative: 마신
synopsis: A hundred children were trapped on Hengshan. Only one walked out alive—a boy named Dan Hyeongwoo. He survived the hell created by the Cheon Gija and gained power worthy of being called that of a demon god in return. But the world felt unfamiliar to him, and its rules made no sense... So, he becomes an escort warrior of the Henan Escort Agency, relearning what people are and what the world is from the ground up. Everything he does is for one single purpose: the day he will take revenge on Cheon Gija. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Umine the Island Inn
titleNative: あの島の海音荘
synopsis: Unemployed 19-year-old Kazuma has been summoned to Asagiri Island, rumored to be home to long lost pirate treasure. He ends up working as an odd-job man at Umine Inn, a traditional Japanese café with women-only lodgings and a host of eccentric yet beautiful women. The stuff of dreams for any man - a romantic comedy about island life and treasure hunting, where the surroundings are beautiful in more ways than one! (Source: K MANGA)

titleNative: 惚れたはれたパンダ
synopsis: Will my love destroy the peace of this town?! After discovering to have incredible stamina, Hanna begins working part-time as a mascot in a costume. Although she is sometimes bullied by children, she was meant to do her best as the mascot hero "Panbuu" to protect the peace of the town - but her true identity is about to be discovered by Ubukata-kun, who is in the class next to her!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

titleEnglish: Blue Archive: Problem Solver 68 Business Diary
titleNative: ブルーアーカイブ 便利屋68業務日誌
synonyms: Blue Archive: Problem Solver 68 Business Diary
synopsis: Welcome to Kivotos, the Academy City, where students spend their daily lives armed. Follow the lives of the four girls who run a business here as they take on all kinds of odd jobs just to keep it afloat. With the self-proclaimed Outlaw CEO, Rikuhachima Aru, at the helm, Problem Solver 68 is always ready to stir up a storm! Tag along with the crew on their misadventures in the long-awaited official Blue Archive spin-off manga! (Source: Kaiten Books)

title: Sono Uruwashiki Hito wa,
titleNative: そのうるわしきひとは、
synopsis: Koto, a very ordinary girl, is good friends with Fumi, the top student at an exclusive all-girls' school. Fumi is the perfect student, with her combination of talent and beauty, but after summer vacation, she suddenly disappears without a trace. Amidst the rumors circulating around the school, Koto discovers a diary. Hoping to solve the mystery of her friend's disappearance, what will Koto learn from the diary…? (Source: Hakusensha, translated) Note: Chapter count includes a volume-bonus chapter.

title: Shiroki Otome no Werewolf
titleNative: 白き乙女の人狼
synopsis: Hakurai Private Academy, a boarding school where young ladies receive a higher education in bridehood. Should the maidens lose their “purity” during the three year course, they are immediately expelled, losing any chance at their dreams of becoming brides. For the girls living at this school, it is a future they consider worse than death. One day, something happens in the dormitory of the student council! In their midst is a two-faced wolf aiming for their purity - and it is up to them to pull back the mask!

title: Suterare Shiro Mahoutsukai no Koucha Seikatsu
titleRomaji: Suterare Shiro Mahoutsukai no Koucha Seikatsu
titleNative: 捨てられ白魔法使いの紅茶生活
synopsis: In a quest to subdue a golden dragon, a white mage named Amalia is double-crossed by her party, leaving her for dead with her injuries. However, the dragon takes pity on her helpless situation and restores Amalia's health in exchange for a favor: observing human life. The dragon then takes the form of a child, using "Yuugo" as an alias. As Amalia accepts Yuugo's request, she soon realizes that ten years have since passed. Mixed with shock and confusion, Amalia tries to start a new life with Yuugo as a foster son, doing her best to fulfill her new objective. Soon enough, Yuugo begins to show interest in the culture of tea, and as someone adept in brewing them, Amalia's tea-laden life will now begin!

title: Aldo no Isekai Tensei
titleNative: アルドの異世界転生
synopsis: A man who lost his family and fell into the depths of despair meets his end—only to be reborn in another world of swords and magic as Aldo, the heir of a noble family. He begins a new life alongside his twin brother Elphas and his loving parents. However, haunted by the fear of losing those he loves once again, Aldo starts to shut his heart off from his family. But when the roar of a ferocious magical beast threatens to devour them, the boy rises to his feet— determined this time to protect what he once lost in his previous life. A story of redemption and a second chance at heroism begins! (Source: Overlap, translated)

title: Angnyeonimui Choeaero Gantaekdoen Sajeong
titleNative: 악녀님의 최애로 간택된 사정
synonyms: The Circumstances of Being Chosen as the Villainess's Favorite
How I Ended Up as the Villainess’s Favorite
synopsis: I’ve been reincarnated as Lariette, a lowly sidekick destined to be the female lead’s errand girl. Tired of being a doormat, I decide to switch sides and suck up to the empire’s most powerful villainess, Evangeline. But the “vicious” villainess is actually a total sweetheart! Not only is she showering me with gifts, she’s now insisting I marry her brother so we can be family forever. There’s just one problem: her brother is the original male lead, a man supposed to be obsessed with the original heroine. I’ve tried my best to keep my distance, but he won’t stop pursuing me. “What makes you think I’m not interested in you, My Lady?” (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleRomaji: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleNative: 怪異部～M県Y市の怪現象について～
synonyms: Kaiibu ~ M-ken Y-shi no Kai Genshou ni Tsuite~
synopsis: When transfer student Sakura Sakuraba arrives in Yuuyamichou, she discovers a place steeped in bizarre, ancient customs. The children there all have strange names and are bound by a curse that prevents them from leaving the city until they graduate high school. Caught in an escalating nightmare, Sakura must navigate curses, summonings, and betrayals. To break the curse and free the children, Sakura teams up with Uzu Andou, the mysterious president of the Paranormal Club. Their strange "club activities" are about to begin! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Bullobulsaro Sandaneun Geoseun
titleNative: 불로불사로 산다는 것은
synopsis: Roberta, a priestess of the church, is designated as the head priestess of a remote region in the northern edge—Dithmar. As the appointment came immediately after the disappearance of her predecessor, Roberta remained on guard and began to investigate Duke Ulrich of Dithmarschen. According to rumors, he has ruled over the region's lord for over 300 years, and even claimed to be an immortal... one who lives a life no human should be capable of possessing. Determined to uncover the truth, Roberta decides to trace his steps. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Gakuen no Madonna no Watanabe-san ga, Naze ka Maishuu Yotei wo Kiitekuru @COMIC
titleRomaji: Gakuen no Madonna no Watanabe-san ga, Naze ka Maishuu Yotei wo Kiitekuru @COMIC
titleNative: 学園のマドンナの渡辺さんが、なぜか毎週予定を聞いてくる@COMIC
synopsis: Ryoichi Aikawa, an ordinary high school boy who’s crazy about fishing, helps the school’s Madonna, Misa Watanabe, when she’s being bothered by guys trying to pick her up by the seaside. After that, for some reason, Watanabe starts asking about his weekend plans every week and ends up making plans with him. Secretly meeting every weekend, the two slowly at an incredibly slow pace begin to close the distance between them…? A frustratingly sweet seaside romantic comedy featuring a single-minded, love-offensive JK and an unbelievably dense, iron-wall boy!

On the stage of this small restaurant, a gourmet tale of joy and sorrow alike begins to unfold! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

The series is titled Koudou Wolf (Highway Wolf), and it will feature highway races. The manga's first chapter will be 45 pages long and include color opening pages. (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: One day, a fox is ready to pounce on a rabbit, only to receive a confession from its would-be prey. Ignoring the fox's confusion, the rabbit professes, “I love you.” As this bold approach takes effect, the fox's hard heart begins, little by little, to soften. Will predator and prey ever be able to coexist…? (Source: Yen Press) Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Kagaku Chop
titleNative: カガクチョップ
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: I Picked Up a No-Good, Useless Prince
titleEnglish: I Picked Up a No-Good, Useless Prince
titleNative: 断罪されたダメ王子、拾いました。
synonyms: I Groom A Stray Prince to Be Imperfect.
synopsis: Kuruhi, first prince of Gahama Kingdom, is the epitome of a spoiled brat with his arrogant attitude and behavior. After countless misdeeds, he is finally banished from the royal family and reduced to a commoner! The wandering, mud-covered former prince finds himself at an inn run by Emma, a girl who has a severe obsession with royalty drama. Emma is bewildered by the sudden appearance of her "Oshi", and determined to get him back on his feet, she embarks on a grand project! (Source: ComicGardo, translated)

title: Noppiki Naranu
titleNative: ノっぴきならぬ
synopsis: Seven years ago, Toraji met the most beautiful man he had ever seen. The time they spent together was as passionate as it was brief, and the man disappeared among the multitudes of Edo, the shogunate's capital. Toraji never learned his real name, or address, or occupation - but he never gave up on finding him again. Only, he didn't expect that when he did, the man would turn out to be the master of a high-class ryokan and restaurant, or that he would have a young daughter. How did this happen? Why did he run? Who is the child's mother and where is she? And most of all, will Toraji get a second chance to pursue the one great love of his life?

titleNative: 成瀬は恋が証明できない
synopsis: Hiyoko is a second-year master's student in the Graduate School of Science and Engineering. She tends to be overbearing when in love and her boyfriend has just dumped her without a word. As she was feeling depressed about the breakup, Naruse, a smart guy in her lab, proposes an experimental relationship, saying, "I want to analyze your love life and figure out your problem..." But whenever Naruse gets close to her, her heart rate seems to blow up off the scale! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

The Legendary Witch is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

titleNative: 鉄鍋のジャン!R 頂上作戦
synonyms: Iron Wok Jan! R: The Summit Operations
synopsis: This year in major international competition of Chinese cuisine, the presumed winners are assured of victory. Indeed, a major sponsor is behind them. These are the ultra-powerful and ultra-wealthy 13 dragons, mostly linked to the Mafia. About this competition which is of prime importance, they control the judges, and put pressure on some competitors worrisome. However it was not counting on the arrival of a cook who fears no pressure. Known in the culinary world for his pranks and his eccentricity, he was once involved in the murder by poisoning. After disappearing for years in China, where nobody knew what he was doing, Jan is back!

title: Kubinashi Seirei-sama ni Kuchizuke wo
titleNative: 首なし精霊様に口づけを
synonyms: A Kiss For the Headless Spirit
synopsis: A deadly curse is slowly killing Teo, and none of the healers or magic users he's ever met have been able to help him - until one day, during his travels, he finds the natural spirit Arvahany. Arvahany hates humans and has secrets of his own, not the least of which is that he has lost a considerable part of his powers. Teo has something he wants, and so he binds him with a contract to save himself, promising Teo to break his curse at the end of it, as a reward. But will the two be able to save each other? It might be much harder than either of them thought...

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)

titleRomaji: Kiss toka Koi toka, NG nano ni
titleNative: キスとか恋とか、NGなのに
synopsis: Rio and Yakumo are members of the idol group KEy, formed through an audition program. One day, while wishing to become closer to the cool Yakumo, an unexpected kiss completely changes their relationship! It turns out Yakumo was actually a super-devoted fan, absolutely obsessed and in love with Rio! Since confessing his feelings, Yakumo's romantic and lustful desires have only escalated. Seeing the special side he only shows him, Rio begins to waver between friendship and love... (Source: Overlap, translated) Note: Includes two extra chapters.
